mapper.insert:
SELECT PROJECTNOTICE_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO projectnotice( projectNoticeNum, projectid, subject, content, hitcount, regdate, isnotice, state, authorempid ) VALUES( #{projectNoticeNum}, #{projectid}, #{subject}, #{content}, 0, SYSDATE, #{isnotice}, 1, #{authorempid} )
mapper.update: UPDATE projectnotice SET subject = #{subject}, content = #{content}, isnotice = #{isnotice}, updatedate = SYSDATE WHERE projectNoticeNum = #{projectNoticeNum}
mapper.select:
SELECT n.projectNoticeNum, n.projectid, p.title AS projectName, n.subject, n.hitcount, n.isnotice, n.state, TO_CHAR(n.regdate,'YYYY-MM-DD') regdate, TO_CHAR(n.updatedate,'YYYY-MM-DD') updatedate, n.authorempid, e.name AS authorName FROM projectnotice n LEFT JOIN employee2 e ON n.authorempid = e.empid LEFT JOIN project p ON n.projectid = p.projectid WHERE n.state = 1 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM empproject ep WHERE ep.projectid = n.projectid AND ep.empid = #{empId} )
AND n.projectid = #{projectid}
AND ( n.subject LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR n.content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY n.isnotice DESC, n.projectNoticeNum DESC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT n.projectNoticeNum, n.projectid, n.subject, n.content, n.hitcount, n.isnotice, n.state, TO_CHAR(n.regdate,'YYYY-MM-DD') regdate, TO_CHAR(n.updatedate,'YYYY-MM-DD') updatedate, n.authorempid, e.name AS authorName, p.title AS projectName FROM projectnotice n LEFT JOIN employee2 e ON n.authorempid = e.empid LEFT JOIN project p ON n.projectid = p.projectid WHERE n.projectNoticeNum = #{projectNoticeNum}
SELECT ep.projectid, p.title AS projectname, ep.role FROM empproject ep JOIN project p ON ep.projectid = p.projectid WHERE ep.empid = #{empId} ORDER BY p.title
SELECT ep.projectid, p.title AS projectname, ep.role FROM empproject ep JOIN project p ON ep.projectid = p.projectid WHERE ep.empid = #{empId} AND UPPER(ep.role) = 'M' ORDER BY p.title
mapper.insert:
SELECT PROJECTNOTICEFILE_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO projectnoticefile( filenum, savefilename, originalfilename, filesize, projectNoticeNum ) VALUES( #{filenum}, #{savefilename}, #{originalfilename}, #{filesize}, #{projectNoticeNum} )
mapper.select: SELECT filenum, savefilename, originalfilename, filesize, projectNoticeNum FROM projectnoticefile WHERE projectNoticeNum = #{projectNoticeNum} ORDER BY filenum
SELECT filenum, savefilename, originalfilename, filesize, projectNoticeNum FROM projectnoticefile WHERE filenum = #{filenum}
